description_long: This is a large, two-story suburban house with a prominent gable roof and a mix of exterior finishes, including white siding and a central section of brickwork. The front facade features a covered porch supported by columns, a double-door main entrance, and a two-car garage with a concrete driveway. Multiple rectangular windows are symmetrically arranged across both floors, providing ample natural light. The landscaping includes a narrow strip of greenery with low shrubs and a tall, conical tree near the entryway. The rear of the house has a spacious patio area, while the sides are more minimal, with additional windows and a continuation of the roofline. The overall design blends traditional and modern suburban architectural elements, making it suitable for a family residence in an urban neighborhood.
description: A large, two-story suburban house with a gable roof, brick and white siding, a covered porch, and a two-car garage. Symmetrical windows and landscaped features enhance its modern-traditional appeal.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with a covered porch, double doors, two-car garage, and landscaped driveway.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the garage, driveway extension, and minimal window arrangement.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a spacious patio area and symmetrical window placement on both floors.
description_view_3: Right side view with additional windows and a clear view of the driveway and landscaping.
attribute_entryway_design: Double-door entry with a covered porch, columns, and a small landscaped area.
